predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_citizen_of_union
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union. This is a background status that may be directly asserted in a case.

predicates.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

predicates.name: is_present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
predicates.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria is met for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination on the basis of one or more objective criteria.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
predicates.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The foreigner falls under the category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The foreigner is identified: possesses valid travel/identity document, is recognised by national authority willing to issue laissez-passer, or falls under a direct laissez-passer nationality category.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
predicates.description: Criterion 1: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not submit an application for international protection within the legally required period.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
predicates.description: Criterion 2: the person used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
predicates.description: Criterion 3: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
predicates.description: Criterion 4: the person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a qualifying measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
predicates.description: Criterion 5: the person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
predicates.description: Criterion 6: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence decision, pushback, or removal measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
predicates.description: Criterion 7: the person concealed, when questioned, that they had already given fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
predicates.description: Criterion 8: the person submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
predicates.description: Criterion 9: the person concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
predicates.description: Criterion 10: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those stated in their international protection or residence application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
predicates.description: Criterion 11: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time
predicates.description: The person did not submit an application for international protection within the legally required period.

predicates.name: used_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a qualifying measure under criterion 4.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a qualifying measure under criterion 4.

predicates.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence decision, pushback, or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person concealed, when questioned, that they had already given fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application
predicates.description: The person concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_application
predicates.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those stated in their international protection or residence application.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
